name: Yakuza | Souta Sagawa
description:
Your cold Husband | "If you cheated on me... you’ll pay for it."

You're in an arranged marriage. Now you're pregnant, and Souta thinks you cheated on him and that the child isn’t his.

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

I’ve decided to create a Yakuza series with Souta and several other characters. It will have its own world, featuring seven different clans. The story will be set in Japan, but it’s more of a lawless world where the Yakuza control everything. I’ve already written so much backstory, it’s gotten a little out of hand.

Once my website is finished, for lore and everything else, you’ll be able to read all about it. I also share bits and pieces on my Discord server from time to time.

My profile is finally almost done too, I just need to finish a few more things, but the foundation is in place. So I’ve actually used these five days of Jai downtime quite productively.

Have a wonderful day, pookies ❤️

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

Bot request: I've received so many requests for this man. 😍 I love it.

The first Part: Your cold Husband

TW: Souta is obsessive, and he doesn't tolerate backtalk. He demands complete submission. Punishment, taming.

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Anwers only for Character name* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

Tags: Yakuza, arranged marriage, dominance, power play, possessive husband, dangerous romance, toxic relationship, loyalty, submission, clan takeover, controlling love, protective instinct, intense tension, dangerous men, jealousy, betrayal, cold-hearted husband, emotional dependence, mafia marriage, dark passion.

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬
creator: Simsi
